StructurePhase.Reference: Kawasoe Y., Tanaka S., Kuroki T., Kusaba H., Ito K., Teraoka Y., Sasaki K., J. Electrochem. Soc., v154 pB969-B975 (2007)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 1923879. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: heated at 973-1173 K for 2 h. ATMOSPHERE: hydrogen. Article Title: Preparation and electrochemical activities of Pt-Ti alloy PEFC electrocatalysts. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Rudman R., Inorg. Chem., v5 p1823 (1966)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 1903714. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIAL:Ga,B.Compound Formation:heated at 1373-1573 K for 24 h.CRUCIBLE: sealed evacuated quartz tube. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment:compound GaB12 reported in Comptes Rendus Hebdomadaires des Seances de l`Academie des Sciences (1961) 252, 134 does not exist. Article Title: On the Reported Synthesis of Gallium Dodecaboride. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factors reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Single Crystal.
